org.kink_lang.kink.internal.callstack

Package
Description
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.callstack
Call stacks used in the evaluator.
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.compile.javaclassir
Intermediate representation before JVM byte code compilation.
  • Classes in org.kink_lang.kink.internal.callstack used by org.kink_lang.kink.internal.callstack
    Class
    Description
    CallStackSlice
    Slice of call stack.
    Cse
    The call stack element.
    KontTagCse
    A CSE of reset tag.
    Location
    A position on a program; used in stack traces.
    ResumeCse
    Call stack element which indicates resumption of a fun call.
    TailTraceRingBuffer
    Ring buffer of traces of tail-calls.
    Trace
    A trace of a call.
